paragraphs.title: First Script Dimension16
paragraphs.text:
%neo4j

MATCH (v:VertexNode)<-[vI:VertexIndexedBy]-(i:IndexedBy)-[]->(e:Evaluate)          
                     where i.N="9" AND i.MaxN="10" AND i.Dimension="16"
WITH i.N as iN, i.MaxN as iM,e,v,vI,i                        
OPTIONAL MATCH (vv:VertexNode)<-[vII:VertexIndexedBy]-(ii:IndexedByArgument)-[]->(ee:Evaluate {Value:toString(vI.twoSeq)})      
                    where ii.MaxN="10"  AND ii.Dimension="16"
WITH iN,iM,e,v,vv,ee,vI,vII
//return iN,iM,e,v,vv,ee,vI,vII
CREATE (p:ProductArgsNode {Divisor:vI.twoSeq,Dimension:"16"}) 
FOREACH(snoreMe IN CASE  WHEN vv.Degree IS null  THEN [1] ELSE [] END | 
CREATE (v) <- [:ProductRelationT {T:vI.twoSeq,Divisor:vI.divisor}] - (p) )                                                      
FOREACH(snoreMe IN CASE  WHEN vv.Degree IS not null  THEN [1] ELSE [] END | 
CREATE (v) <- [:ProductRelationT {T:vI.twoSeq,Divisor:vI.divisor}] - (p)    
CREATE (p) - [:ProductRelationA {T:vII.twoSeq, Eval:ee.Value,Divisor:vII.divisor}] -> (vv)  )
MERGE  (i:IndexedBy {N:iN, Dimension:"16",MaxN:iM,RowCounter:vI.twoSeq})
MERGE  (i)-[:VertexIndexedBy]->(p)
MERGE (i) -[:IndexedByEvaluate]->(e)
RETURN i,p,v,vv,ee,vI,vII

paragraphs.title: S1 CSV EXPORT
paragraphs.text:
%neo4j
Call apoc.export.csv.query("
UNWIND range(2,19) AS n
WITH toString(n) AS N, '20' as nMax
MATCH (v:VertexNode)<-[vI:VertexIndexedBy]-(i:IndexedBy {N:N,MaxN:nMax,Dimension:'16'})-[]->(e:Evaluate)
WITH i.N as iN, i.MaxN as iM,e,v,vI,i                        
OPTIONAL MATCH (vv:VertexNode)<-[vII:VertexIndexedBy]-(ii:IndexedByArgument)-[]->(ee:Evaluate {Value:toString(vI.twoSeq)})      
                    where ii.MaxN=iM  AND ii.Dimension='16'

WITH
vI.twoSeq AS vTwoSeq,
vI.divisor AS vDivisor,
vII.twoSeq AS vvTwoSeq,
ee.Value AS eeValue,
vII.divisor AS vvDivisor,
iN,
iM,
i.Dimension AS iDimension,
v.Scalar AS vScalar,
v.Degree AS vDegree,
vv.Scalar AS vvScalar,
vv.Degree AS vvDegree,i
                                      //toString( CASE WHEN toString(i.RowCounter)='2' THEN apoc.number.exact.mul(toString(v.Scalar),'2') ELSE toString(v.Scalar) END ) AS TTScalarRowCounter
WITH

iN,iM,vTwoSeq as pD,vTwoSeq,vvDegree,vvScalar,vDivisor,vvDivisor,vvTwoSeq,   //,toString( CASE WHEN toString(i.RowCounter)='2' THEN toString(vScalar) ELSE toString(vScalar) END ) AS TTScalarRowCounter, 
CASE WHEN vvScalar IS null THEN 99 ELSE  toInteger(eeValue) END as p2Eval,
     toString( CASE WHEN toString(vDegree)='-1' THEN apoc.number.exact.mul(toString(vScalar),'2') ELSE toString(vScalar) END ) AS TTScalar,
toString( CASE WHEN toString(vvDegree)='-1' THEN apoc.number.exact.mul(toString(vvScalar),'2') ELSE toString(vvScalar) END) AS AAScalar,
toString( CASE WHEN toString(vDegree)='-1' THEN apoc.number.exact.add(vDegree,'1') ELSE apoc.number.exact.add(vDegree,'0') END ) AS TTDegree,
toString( CASE WHEN toString(vvDegree)='-1' THEN apoc.number.exact.add(vvDegree,'1') ELSE apoc.number.exact.add(vvDegree,'0')  END) AS AADegree

RETURN
iM,iN,pD,p2Eval,vTwoSeq,TTDegree,TTScalar,vDivisor,vvDivisor,vvTwoSeq,AADegree,AAScalar,
CASE WHEN vvDegree IS Null THEN TTDegree ELSE apoc.number.exact.add(TTDegree,AADegree) END AS degreeSum,
CASE WHEN vvScalar IS Null THEN toString(TTScalar) ELSE apoc.number.exact.mul(TTScalar,AAScalar) END as scalarProduct,
CASE WHEN vvScalar IS Null THEN toString(vDivisor) ELSE apoc.number.exact.mul( toString(vDivisor),apoc.number.exact.mul(toString(vvDivisor),toString(pD))) END as resultDivisor
"

paragraphs.title: Second Script
paragraphs.text:
%neo4j

MATCH (i:IndexedBy)-[]->(e:Evaluate),(i:IndexedBy)-[:VertexIndexedBy]->(p:ProductArgsNode) where i.N='9' AND i.MaxN='10' AND i.Dimension="16"  
WITH i,e,p,i.N as iN, i.MaxN as iM
MATCH (v:VertexNode) <- [p1:ProductRelationT] - (p) 
//WITH i,e,p,v,p1,iN,iM,toString( CASE WHEN toString(i.RowCounter)="2" THEN apoc.number.exact.mul(toString(v.Scalar),"2") ELSE toString(v.Scalar) END ) AS TTScalarRowCounter

WITH i,e,p,v,p1,iN,iM,toString( CASE WHEN toString(i.RowCounter)="2" THEN toString(v.Scalar) ELSE toString(v.Scalar) END ) AS TTScalarRowCounter
OPTIONAL MATCH  (p) - [p2:ProductRelationA] -> (vv:VertexNode)
WITH i,e,p,v,p1,p2,vv,iN,iM,p.Divisor as pD,CASE WHEN p2 IS null THEN 99 ELSE  toInteger(p2.Eval) END as p2Eval,
     toString( CASE WHEN toString(v.Degree)="-1" THEN apoc.number.exact.mul(toString(v.Scalar),"2") ELSE toString(TTScalarRowCounter) END ) AS TTScalar,
//     toString( CASE WHEN toString(vv.Degree)="-1" THEN apoc.number.exact.mul(toString(vv.Scalar),"2") ELSE apoc.number.exact.mul(toString(vv.Scalar),p2.T) END) AS AAScalar,     
     toString( CASE WHEN toString(vv.Degree)="-1" THEN apoc.number.exact.mul(toString(vv.Scalar),"2") ELSE toString(vv.Scalar) END) AS AAScalar,
     toString( CASE WHEN toString(v.Degree)="-1" THEN apoc.number.exact.add(v.Degree,"1") ELSE apoc.number.exact.add(v.Degree,"0") END ) AS TTDegree,
     toString( CASE WHEN toString(vv.Degree)="-1" THEN apoc.number.exact.add(vv.Degree,"1") ELSE apoc.number.exact.add(vv.Degree,"0")  END) AS AADegree


Merge (cl:CollectedProductArgNode {Dimension:'16',MaxN:'10',N:'9',Divisor:pD,afe:p2Eval,tft:toInteger(p1.T)})                                       
CREATE (cl)-[:Arguments]->(aN:ArgumentsNode { TDegree:TTDegree,
                                              TScalar:apoc.number.exact.add(TTScalar,"0"),  
                                              TDivisor:p1.Divisor,
                                              ADivisor:p2.Divisor,
                                              ATwoSeq:apoc.number.exact.add(p2.T,"0"),        
                                              ADegree:AADegree,   
                                              AScalar:apoc.number.exact.add(AAScalar,"0"),
                                              DegreeSum:CASE WHEN vv.Degree IS Null THEN TTDegree ELSE apoc.number.exact.add(TTDegree,AADegree) END,
                                              ScalarProduct:CASE WHEN vv.Scalar IS Null THEN toString(TTScalar) ELSE apoc.number.exact.mul(TTScalar,AAScalar) END,
                                              ResultDivisor:CASE WHEN vv.Scalar IS Null THEN toString(p1.Divisor) ELSE apoc.number.exact.mul( toString(p1.Divisor),apoc.number.exact.mul(toString(p2.Divisor),toString(pD))) END })
RETURN cl,aN

paragraphs.title: S2 IMPORT CSV
paragraphs.text:
%neo4j
USING PERIODIC COMMIT 2000
LOAD CSV WITH HEADERS FROM "file:/" + "D16N20S1.csv" AS line FIELDTERMINATOR ";"
WITH line
Merge (cl:CollectedProductArgNode {Dimension:'16',MaxN:line.iM,N:line.iN,Divisor:line.pD,afe:line.p2Eval,tft:toInteger(line.vTwoSeq)})                                       
CREATE (cl)-[:Arguments]->(aN:ArgumentsNode { TDegree:line.TTDegree,
                                              TScalar:line.TTScalar,                    
                                              TDivisor:line.vDivisor,
                                              ADivisor:line.vvDivisor,
                                              ATwoSeq:line.vvTwoSeq,                          
                                              ADegree:line.AADegree,   
                                              AScalar:line.AAScalar,                  
                                              DegreeSum:line.degreeSum,
                                              ScalarProduct:line.scalarProduct,
                                              ResultDivisor:line.resultDivisor })

RETURN COUNT(cl)

paragraphs.title: Modern 16Dim evaluate index.
paragraphs.text:
MATCH (cl:CollectedProductArgNode {Dimension:'16',MaxN:'10',N:'9'})-[:Arguments]->(aN:ArgumentsNode)
With max(aN.ResultDivisor) as maxDivisor
MATCH (cl:CollectedProductArgNode {Dimension:'16',MaxN:'10',N:'9'})-[:Arguments]->(aN:ArgumentsNode)
WITH {Divisor:cl.Divisor,afe:cl.afe,tft:cl.tft,DS: COLLECT( {  TDegree:aN.TDegree,
                                      TScalar:aN.TScalar,
                                      TDivisor:aN.TDivisor,
                                      ADivisor:aN.ADivisor,
                                      ATwoSeq:aN.ATwoSeq,
                                      ADegree:aN.ADegree,   
                                      AScalar:aN.AScalar,
                                      ScalarProduct:aN.ScalarProduct,
                                      ResultDivisor:aN.ResultDivisor})}  AS argumentProduct,cl.N as iN,cl.MaxN as iM,maxDivisor
WITH COLLECT(argumentProduct) as argumentProductt,argumentProduct.tft as aPafe,iN,iM,argumentProduct.Divisor as apD,argumentProduct.afe AS aPclafe,maxDivisor
UNWIND RANGE(0,SIZE(argumentProductt)-1) as iii
WITH argumentProductt[iii].DS as aPTds,aPafe,iN,iM,apD,aPclafe,maxDivisor
UNWIND aPTds as aPTdsU
WITH CASE WHEN aPclafe = 99 THEN                                                                                 
{DS:COLLECT({ResultScalar:aPTdsU.ScalarProduct,                                                                          // ResultScalar      
      ResultDegree:aPTdsU.TDegree,                                                                                   // ResultDegree
      //ResultTwoSeq:aPTdsU.tft,
      ResultDivisor:toFloat(aPTdsU.ResultDivisor)}),ET:aPafe,Divisor:apD}                                                            
ELSE
{DS:COLLECT({ResultScalar:aPTdsU.ScalarProduct,                       
    ResultDegree: CASE WHEN aPTdsU.ADegree=-1 THEN aPTdsU.TDegree ELSE toFloat(aPTdsU.ADegree)+toFloat(aPTdsU.TDegree) END,          // ResultDegree compute
    //ResultTwoSeq:aPTdsU.ATwoSeq,
    ResultDivisor:toFloat(aPTdsU.ResultDivisor)}),ET:aPafe,Divisor:apD}
END
AS resultProduct,iN,iM,maxDivisor
WITH COLLECT(resultProduct) as rPC,resultProduct.ET as eT,iN,iM,resultProduct.Divisor as rpD1,maxDivisor
UNWIND RANGE(0,SIZE(rPC)-1) as iI
WITH rPC[iI].DS as rPCDS,eT,iN,iM,rpD1,maxDivisor
UNWIND rPCDS as rPCDSU
WITH {RScalarList:COLLECT({RScalar:rPCDSU.ResultScalar}),RDegree:rPCDSU.ResultDegree,RDivisor:rPCDSU.ResultDivisor,ET:eT,Divisor:rpD1} as resultMap,iN,iM,maxDivisor
WITH COLLECT(resultMap) as resultMapC,resultMap.RDivisor as rDivisor,resultMap.ET as eTrm,resultMap.RDegree as rDRM,iN,iM,resultMap.Divisor as rpD2,maxDivisor
UNWIND RANGE(0,SIZE(resultMapC)-1) as iII
WITH resultMapC[iII].RScalarList as rSL,rDivisor,rDRM,iN,iM,rpD2,maxDivisor
UNWIND RANGE(0,SIZE(rSL)-1) as iIII
UNWIND rSL[iIII] as rSLI
WITH COLLECT(rSLI.RScalar) as cts,rDivisor,rDRM,iN,iM,rpD2,"0" as accumulator,maxDivisor
CREATE (a:Accumulator { acc:"0"})
FOREACH (n IN cts| SET a.acc = apoc.number.exact.add(a.acc,n))  // Divisor (aka rowCounter) not necessary in next line.
//WITH {DSList:COLLECT({Degree:rDRM,Scalar:a.acc}),DivideBy:rDivisor} AS pTerms,iM,iN         //*************************//
WITH {DSList:COLLECT({Degree:rDRM,Scalar:CASE WHEN maxDivisor/rDivisor > 1 THEN apoc.number.exact.mul(a.acc,toString(maxDivisor/rDivisor)) ELSE a.acc END}),DivideBy:maxDivisor} AS pTerms,iM,iN
WITH COLLECT(pTerms) as pTermss,iM,iN
UNWIND RANGE(0,SIZE(pTermss)-1) as pT
WITH pTermss[pT].DSList as dSList,iN,iM    ,pTermss[pT].DivideBy AS pTD
UNWIND dSList as dSListU
CREATE (c:Accumulator {acc:"1"})   //  The nMax to the N...  should not be here very expensive implement alternative
FOREACH (n IN RANGE(1,dSListU.Degree)| SET c.acc = apoc.number.exact.mul(c.acc,toString(iM)))
With apoc.number.exact.mul(dSListU.Scalar,c.acc) as scalarDegreeProduct,pTD
WITH {SDP:COLLECT(scalarDegreeProduct),DivideBy:pTD} as termsMap
//Return termsMap
WITH COLLECT(termsMap) AS termsMapC
UNWIND RANGE(0,SIZE(termsMapC)-1) as pTT
CREATE (b:Accumulator { acc:"0" ,db:termsMapC[pTT].DivideBy })
FOREACH (n IN termsMapC[pTT].SDP| SET b.acc = apoc.number.exact.add(b.acc,n))
WITH apoc.number.exact.div(b.acc,toString(b.db)) AS pResult
//return b.acc,toString(b.db), pResult
WITH COLLECT(pResult) as pResultC
CREATE (sss:Accumulator {acc:"0"})
FOREACH (n in pResultC | SET sss.acc = apoc.number.exact.add(sss.acc,toString(n)))
return sss.acc

WITH {DSList:COLLECT({Degree:rDRM,Scalar:CASE WHEN maxDivisor/rDivisor > 1 THEN apoc.number.exact.mul(a.acc,toString(maxDivisor/rDivisor)) ELSE a.acc END}),DivideBy:maxDivisor} AS pTerms,iM,iN,eTrm
WITH COLLECT(pTerms) as pTermss,iM,iN,eTrm

UNWIND dSList as dSListU

MERGE (e:Evaluate {Value:toString(toInteger(2^toInteger(iN)))}) //  Must be integer value.... Must compute evaluate   or just say it is computing 2^n
MERGE (i) -[:IndexedByEvaluate]->(e)
MERGE  (i)-[eee:VertexIndexedBy {twoSeq:eTrm, divisor:pTD}]->(v)

RETURN i,v,e,eee

CREATE (v:VertexNode {Scalar:tScalar,Degree:toString(tDegree)} )

WITH argumentProductt[iii].DS as aPTds,aPafe,iN,iM,apD,aPclafe,maxDivisor
UNWIND aPTds as aPTdsU
WITH CASE WHEN aPclafe = 99 THEN                                                                                 
{DS:COLLECT({ResultScalar:aPTdsU.ScalarProduct,                                                                          // ResultScalar      
       AScalar:aPTdsU.AScalar,
      ResultDegree:aPTdsU.TDegree,                                                                                   // ResultDegree
      //ResultTwoSeq:aPTdsU.tft,
      ResultDivisor:aPTdsU.ResultDivisor}),ET:aPafe,Divisor:apD}                                                            
ELSE
{DS:COLLECT({ResultScalar:aPTdsU.ScalarProduct,
    AScalar:aPTdsU.AScalar,                       
    ResultDegree: CASE WHEN aPTdsU.ADegree=-1 THEN aPTdsU.TDegree ELSE toFloat(aPTdsU.ADegree)+toFloat(aPTdsU.TDegree) END,          // ResultDegree compute
    //ResultTwoSeq:aPTdsU.ATwoSeq,
    ResultDivisor:aPTdsU.ResultDivisor}),ET:aPafe,Divisor:apD}
END
AS resultProduct,iN,iM,maxDivisor
WITH COLLECT(resultProduct) as rPC,resultProduct.ET as eT,iN,iM,resultProduct.Divisor as rpD1,maxDivisor
UNWIND RANGE(0,SIZE(rPC)-1) as iI
WITH rPC[iI].DS as rPCDS,eT,iN,iM,rpD1,maxDivisor
UNWIND rPCDS as rPCDSU
WITH {RScalarList:COLLECT({RScalar:rPCDSU.ResultScalar}),RDegree:rPCDSU.ResultDegree,RDivisor:rPCDSU.ResultDivisor,ET:eT,Divisor:rpD1,AScalar:rPCDSU.AScalar} as resultMap,iN,iM,maxDivisor
WITH COLLECT(resultMap) as resultMapC,resultMap.RDivisor as rDivisor,resultMap.ET as eTrm,resultMap.RDegree as rDRM,iN,iM,resultMap.Divisor as rpD2,resultMap.AScalar AS rAScalar ,maxDivisor
UNWIND RANGE(0,SIZE(resultMapC)-1) as iII
WITH resultMapC[iII].RScalarList as rSL,rDivisor,rDRM,iN,iM,rpD2,resultMapC[iII].AScalar AS rAScalar,maxDivisor
UNWIND RANGE(0,SIZE(rSL)-1) as iIII
UNWIND rSL[iIII] as rSLI
WITH COLLECT(rSLI.RScalar) as cts,rDivisor,rDRM,iN,iM,rpD2,rAScalar,"0" as accumulator,maxDivisor
CREATE (a:Accumulator { acc:"0"})
FOREACH (n IN cts| SET a.acc = apoc.number.exact.add(a.acc,n))  // Divisor (aka rowCounter) not necessary in next line.
WITH {DSList:COLLECT({Degree:rDRM,Scalar:a.acc}),DivideBy:rDivisor} AS pTerms,iM,iN,rAScalar         //*************************//
//WITH {DSList:COLLECT({Degree:rDRM,Scalar:CASE WHEN maxDivisor/rDivisor > 1 THEN apoc.number.exact.mul(a.acc,toString(maxDivisor/rDivisor)) ELSE a.acc END}),DivideBy:maxDivisor} AS pTerms,iM,iN
WITH COLLECT(pTerms) as pTermss,iM,iN,rAScalar
UNWIND RANGE(0,SIZE(pTermss)-1) as pT
WITH pTermss[pT].DSList as dSList,iN,iM    ,pTermss[pT].DivideBy AS pTD,rAScalar
UNWIND dSList as dSListU
//RETURN dSListU.Degree,dSListU.Scalar,pTD
CREATE (c:Accumulator {acc:"1"})   //  The nMax to the N...  should not be here very expensive implement alternative
FOREACH (n IN RANGE(1,dSListU.Degree)| SET c.acc = apoc.number.exact.mul(c.acc,toString(iM)))
With apoc.number.exact.mul(dSListU.Scalar,c.acc) as scalarDegreeProduct,pTD,rAScalar
WITH {SDP:COLLECT(scalarDegreeProduct),DivideBy:toString(pTD)} as termsMap,rAScalar
//Return termsMap
WITH COLLECT(termsMap) AS termsMapC,rAScalar
UNWIND RANGE(0,SIZE(termsMapC)-1) as pTT
RETURN termsMapC[pTT].SDP,rAScalar                                             
CREATE (b:Accumulator { acc:"0" ,db:toString(termsMapC[pTT].DivideBy) })
FOREACH (n IN termsMapC[pTT].SDP| SET b.acc = apoc.number.exact.add(b.acc,n))
WITH apoc.number.exact.div(b.acc,toString(b.db)) AS pResult,b,rAScalar
return b.acc,toString(b.db), pResult,rAScalar

{DS:COLLECT({ResultScalar:aPTdsU.ScalarProduct,

    ResultDivisor:aPTdsU.ResultDivisor}),ET:aPafe,Divisor:apD}
END
AS resultProduct,iN,iM,maxDivisor

WITH COLLECT(resultProduct) as rPC,resultProduct.ET as eT,iN,iM,resultProduct.Divisor as rpD1,maxDivisor
UNWIND RANGE(0,SIZE(rPC)-1) as iI
WITH rPC[iI].DS as rPCDS,eT,iN,iM,rpD1,maxDivisor
UNWIND rPCDS as rPCDSU
WITH {RScalarList:COLLECT({RScalar:rPCDSU.ResultScalar}),RDegree:rPCDSU.ResultDegree,RDivisor:rPCDSU.ResultDivisor,ET:eT,Divisor:rpD1} as resultMap,iN,iM,maxDivisor
WITH COLLECT(resultMap) as resultMapC,resultMap.RDivisor as rDivisor,resultMap.ET as eTrm,resultMap.RDegree as rDRM,iN,iM,resultMap.Divisor as rpD2,maxDivisor
UNWIND RANGE(0,SIZE(resultMapC)-1) as iII
WITH resultMapC[iII].RScalarList as rSL,rDivisor,rDRM,iN,iM,rpD2,maxDivisor    //,eTrm
UNWIND RANGE(0,SIZE(rSL)-1) as iIII
UNWIND rSL[iIII] as rSLI
//RETURN rSLI.RScalar,rDivisor,rDRM,iN,iM,maxDivisor,eTrm
WITH COLLECT(apoc.number.exact.mul(rSLI.RScalar,apoc.number.exact.div(maxDivisor,rDivisor))) as cts,rDRM,iN,iM,rpD2,"0" as accumulator,maxDivisor //  rDivisor, ///  Here is where number.exact.mul should occure.
CREATE (a:Accumulator { acc:"0"})
FOREACH (n IN cts| SET a.acc = apoc.number.exact.add(a.acc,n))  
WITH {DSList:COLLECT({Degree:rDRM,Scalar:a.acc}),DivideBy:maxDivisor} AS pTerms,iM,iN 

//  Below need a refactor - the degree should not be in the collected maps  -  the number.exact.mul should occure earlier in the script.
//WITH {DSList:COLLECT({Degree:rDRM,Scalar:apoc.number.exact.mul(a.acc,apoc.number.exact.div(maxDivisor,rDivisor))}),DivideBy:maxDivisor} AS pTerms,iM,iN

WITH COLLECT(pTerms) as pTermss,iM,iN
UNWIND RANGE(0,SIZE(pTermss)-1) as pT
WITH pTermss[pT].DSList as dSList,iN,iM,pTermss[pT].DivideBy AS pTD
UNWIND dSList as dSListU
//RETURN dSListU.Degree,dSListU.Scalar,pTD,iM,iN

MERGE (e:Evaluate {Value:toString(toInteger(2^toInteger(iN)))}) //  Must be integer value.... Must compute evaluate   or just say it is computing 2^n
MERGE (i) -[:IndexedByEvaluate]->(e)
MERGE  (i)-[eee:VertexIndexedBy {twoSeq:"99", divisor:pTD}]->(v)    //  D8 script is multiplying scalar by twoSeq.

WITH toString(n) AS N, "10" as nMax

MATCH (cl:CollectedProductArgNode {Dimension:'16',MaxN:nMax,N:N})-[:Arguments]->(aN:ArgumentsNode)
With max(aN.ResultDivisor) as maxDivisor,N,nMax
MATCH (cl:CollectedProductArgNode {Dimension:'16',MaxN:nMax,N:N})-[:Arguments]->(aN:ArgumentsNode)
WITH {Divisor:cl.Divisor,afe:cl.afe,tft:cl.tft,DS: COLLECT( {  TDegree:aN.TDegree,
      TScalar:aN.TScalar,TDivisor:aN.TDivisor,ADivisor:aN.ADivisor,ATwoSeq:aN.ATwoSeq,
      ADegree:aN.ADegree,AScalar:aN.AScalar,DegreeSum:aN.DegreeSum,ScalarProduct:aN.ScalarProduct,
      ResultDivisor:aN.ResultDivisor})}  AS argumentProduct,  N as iN, nMax as iM,maxDivisor  // cl.N as iN,cl.MaxN as iM,
WITH COLLECT(argumentProduct) as argumentProductt,argumentProduct.tft as aPafe,iN,iM,argumentProduct.Divisor as apD,argumentProduct.afe AS aPclafe,maxDivisor
UNWIND RANGE(0,SIZE(argumentProductt)-1) as iii
WITH argumentProductt[iii].DS as aPTds,aPafe,iN,iM,apD,aPclafe,maxDivisor
UNWIND aPTds as aPTdsU
//RETURN aPTdsU.ScalarProduct,aPTdsU.TScalar,aPTdsU.AScalar,aPTdsU.TDivisor,aPTdsU.ADivisor,aPTdsU.ADegree,aPTdsU.TDegree,aPTdsU.ResultDivisor,aPafe,iN,iM,apD,aPclafe,maxDivisor
WITH CASE WHEN aPclafe = 99 THEN                                                                                 
{DS:COLLECT({ResultScalar:aPTdsU.ScalarProduct,                                                                               
      ResultDegree:aPTdsU.DegreeSum,
      ResultDivisor:aPTdsU.ResultDivisor}),ET:aPafe,Divisor:apD}                                                                                                               
ELSE
{DS:COLLECT({ResultScalar:aPTdsU.ScalarProduct,                       
    ResultDegree:aPTdsU.DegreeSum,                              //CASE WHEN aPTdsU.ADegree=-1 THEN aPTdsU.TDegree ELSE apoc.number.exact.add(aPTdsU.ADegree,aPTdsU.TDegree) END,        
    ResultDivisor:aPTdsU.ResultDivisor}),ET:aPafe,Divisor:apD}
END
AS resultProduct,iN,iM,maxDivisor
//RETURN resultProduct
WITH COLLECT(resultProduct) as rPC,resultProduct.ET as eT,iN,iM,resultProduct.Divisor as rpD1,maxDivisor
UNWIND RANGE(0,SIZE(rPC)-1) as iI
WITH rPC[iI].DS as rPCDS,eT,iN,iM,rpD1,maxDivisor
UNWIND rPCDS as rPCDSU
WITH {RScalarList:COLLECT({RScalar:rPCDSU.ResultScalar}),RDegree:rPCDSU.ResultDegree,RDivisor:rPCDSU.ResultDivisor,ET:eT,Divisor:rpD1} as resultMap,iN,iM,maxDivisor
WITH COLLECT(resultMap) as resultMapC,resultMap.RDivisor as rDivisor,resultMap.ET as eTrm,resultMap.RDegree as rDRM,iN,iM,resultMap.Divisor as rpD2,maxDivisor
UNWIND RANGE(0,SIZE(resultMapC)-1) as iII
WITH resultMapC[iII].RScalarList as rSL,rDivisor,rDRM,iN,iM,rpD2,maxDivisor,eTrm
UNWIND RANGE(0,SIZE(rSL)-1) as iIII
UNWIND rSL[iIII] as rSLI
//RETURN rSLI.RScalar,rDivisor,rDRM,iN,iM,maxDivisor,eTrm
WITH COLLECT(rSLI.RScalar) as cts,rDivisor,rDRM,iN,iM,rpD2,"0" as accumulator,maxDivisor
CREATE (a:Accumulator { acc:"0"})
FOREACH (n IN cts| SET a.acc = apoc.number.exact.add(a.acc,n))  // Divisor (aka rowCounter)
WITH {DSList:COLLECT({Degree:rDRM,Scalar:a.acc}),DivideBy:rDivisor} AS pTerms,iM,iN 
//WITH {DSList:COLLECT({Degree:rDRM,Scalar:apoc.number.exact.mul(a.acc,apoc.number.exact.div(maxDivisor,rDivisor))}),DivideBy:maxDivisor} AS pTerms,iM,iN
//RETURN pTerms
WITH COLLECT(pTerms) as pTermss,iM,iN
UNWIND RANGE(0,SIZE(pTermss)-1) as pT
WITH pTermss[pT].DSList as dSList,iN,iM,pTermss[pT].DivideBy AS pTD
UNWIND dSList as dSListU
//RETURN dSListU.Degree,dSListU.Scalar,pTD
CREATE (c:Accumulator {acc:"1"})   
FOREACH (n IN RANGE(1,toInteger(dSListU.Degree))| SET c.acc = apoc.number.exact.mul(c.acc,toString(iM)))   //  dSListU.Degree must be integer
With apoc.number.exact.mul(dSListU.Scalar,c.acc) as scalarDegreeProduct,pTD,iN,iM
WITH {SDP:COLLECT(scalarDegreeProduct),DivideBy:toString(pTD)} as termsMap,iN,iM
//Return termsMap
WITH COLLECT(termsMap) AS termsMapC,iN,iM
UNWIND RANGE(0,SIZE(termsMapC)-1) as pTT
CREATE (b:Accumulator { acc:"0" ,db:toString(termsMapC[pTT].DivideBy) })
FOREACH (n IN termsMapC[pTT].SDP| SET b.acc = apoc.number.exact.add(b.acc,n))
WITH apoc.number.exact.div(b.acc,toString(b.db)) AS pResult,b,iM,iN

WITH COLLECT(pResult) as evaluates,iN,iM
//return evaluates,iN,iM
CREATE (d:Accumulator { acc:"0"})
FOREACH (n IN evaluates| SET d.acc = apoc.number.exact.add(d.acc,n)) 

RETURN d.acc as Value

{DS:COLLECT({ResultScalar:aPTdsU.ScalarProduct,ResultDegree:aPTdsU.DegreeSum,ResultDivisor:aPTdsU.ResultDivisor}),ET:aPafe,Divisor:apD}                                                                                 
ELSE
{DS:COLLECT({ResultScalar:aPTdsU.ScalarProduct,ResultDegree:aPTdsU.DegreeSum,ResultDivisor:aPTdsU.ResultDivisor}),ET:aPafe,Divisor:apD}
END
AS resultProduct,iN,iM,maxDivisor
//RETURN resultProduct
WITH COLLECT(resultProduct) as rPC,resultProduct.ET as eT,iN,iM,resultProduct.Divisor as rpD1,maxDivisor
UNWIND RANGE(0,SIZE(rPC)-1) as iI
WITH rPC[iI].DS as rPCDS,eT,iN,iM,rpD1,maxDivisor
UNWIND rPCDS as rPCDSU
WITH {RScalarList:COLLECT({RScalar:rPCDSU.ResultScalar}),RDegree:rPCDSU.ResultDegree,RDivisor:rPCDSU.ResultDivisor,ET:eT,Divisor:rpD1} as resultMap,iN,iM,maxDivisor
WITH COLLECT(resultMap) as resultMapC,resultMap.RDivisor as rDivisor,resultMap.ET as eTrm,resultMap.RDegree as rDRM,iN,iM,resultMap.Divisor as rpD2,maxDivisor
UNWIND RANGE(0,SIZE(resultMapC)-1) as iII
WITH resultMapC[iII].RScalarList as rSL,rDivisor,rDRM,iN,iM,rpD2,maxDivisor,eTrm
UNWIND RANGE(0,SIZE(rSL)-1) as iIII
UNWIND rSL[iIII] as rSLI
//RETURN rSLI.RScalar,rDivisor,rDRM,iN,iM,maxDivisor,eTrm
//WITH COLLECT(rSLI.RScalar) as cts,rDivisor,rDRM,iN,iM,rpD2,"0" as accumulator,maxDivisor,eTrm
WITH COLLECT(apoc.number.exact.mul(rSLI.RScalar,apoc.number.exact.div(maxDivisor,rDivisor))) as cts,rDRM,iN,iM,rpD2,"0" as accumulator,maxDivisor,eTrm 
CREATE (a:Accumulator { acc:"0"})
FOREACH (n IN cts| SET a.acc = apoc.number.exact.add(a.acc,n))  
WITH {DSList:COLLECT({Degree:rDRM,Scalar:a.acc}),DivideBy:maxDivisor} AS pTerms,iM,iN,eTrm 
//WITH {DSList:COLLECT({Degree:rDRM,Scalar:apoc.number.exact.mul(a.acc,apoc.number.exact.div(maxDivisor,rDivisor))}),DivideBy:maxDivisor} AS pTerms,iM,iN,eTrm
//RETURN pTerms
WITH COLLECT(pTerms) as pTermss,iM,iN,eTrm
UNWIND RANGE(0,SIZE(pTermss)-1) as pT
WITH pTermss[pT].DSList as dSList,iN,iM,pTermss[pT].DivideBy AS pTD,eTrm
UNWIND dSList as dSListU
WITH dSListU.Degree AS tDegree,dSListU.Scalar AS tScalar,iN,iM,pTD,eTrm
//RETURN tDegree,tScalar,iN,iM,pTD,eTrm
MERGE (i:IndexedBy {N:iN,RowCounter:eTrm,MaxN:iM,Dimension:"32"} )  
CREATE (v:VertexNode {Scalar:tScalar,Degree:toString(tDegree)} )
MERGE (e:Evaluate {Value:toString(toInteger(2^toInteger(iN)))}) //  Must be integer value.... Must compute evaluate   or just say it is computing 2^n
MERGE (i) -[:IndexedByEvaluate]->(e)
MERGE  (i)-[eee:VertexIndexedBy {twoSeq:eTrm, divisor:pTD}]->(v)
RETURN COUNT(i)
//WITH {MaxN:iM,N:iN,Ncount:count(iN),RowCounter:eTrm,countRowCounter:count(eTrm),Degree:toString(tDegree),countDegree:count(tDegree)} as grTelem
//RETURN grTelem.MaxN,grTelem.N,grTelem.Ncount,grTelem.RowCounter,grTelem.countRowCounter,grTelem.Degree,grTelem.countDegre

paragraphs.title: D16S3A All N in MaxN
paragraphs.text:
%neo4j
UNWIND range(2,19) AS n
WITH toString(n) AS N, "20" as nMax

MATCH (cl:CollectedProductArgNode {Dimension:'16',MaxN:nMax,N:N})-[:Arguments]->(aN:ArgumentsNode)
With max(aN.ResultDivisor) as maxDivisor,N,nMax
MATCH (cl:CollectedProductArgNode {Dimension:'16',MaxN:nMax,N:N})-[:Arguments]->(aN:ArgumentsNode)
WITH {Divisor:cl.Divisor,afe:cl.afe,tft:cl.tft,DS: COLLECT( {  TDegree:aN.TDegree,
      TScalar:aN.TScalar,TDivisor:aN.TDivisor,ADivisor:aN.ADivisor,ATwoSeq:aN.ATwoSeq,
      ADegree:aN.ADegree,AScalar:aN.AScalar,DegreeSum:aN.DegreeSum,ScalarProduct:aN.ScalarProduct,
      ResultDivisor:aN.ResultDivisor})}  AS argumentProduct,N as iN,nMax as iM,maxDivisor
WITH COLLECT(argumentProduct) as argumentProductt,argumentProduct.tft as aPafe,iN,iM,argumentProduct.Divisor as apD,argumentProduct.afe AS aPclafe,maxDivisor
UNWIND RANGE(0,SIZE(argumentProductt)-1) as iii
WITH argumentProductt[iii].DS as aPTds,aPafe,iN,iM,apD,aPclafe,maxDivisor
UNWIND aPTds as aPTdsU
//RETURN aPTdsU.ScalarProduct,aPTdsU.TScalar,aPTdsU.AScalar,aPTdsU.TDivisor,aPTdsU.ADivisor,aPTdsU.ADegree,aPTdsU.TDegree,aPTdsU.ResultDivisor,aPafe,iN,iM,apD,aPclafe,maxDivisor
WITH CASE WHEN aPclafe = 99 THEN                                                                                 
{DS:COLLECT({ResultScalar:aPTdsU.ScalarProduct,                                                                               
      ResultDegree:aPTdsU.DegreeSum,
      ResultDivisor:aPTdsU.ResultDivisor}),ET:aPafe,Divisor:apD}                                                                                                               
ELSE
{DS:COLLECT({ResultScalar:aPTdsU.ScalarProduct,                       
    ResultDegree:aPTdsU.DegreeSum,                                      
    ResultDivisor:aPTdsU.ResultDivisor}),ET:aPafe,Divisor:apD}
END
AS resultProduct,iN,iM,maxDivisor
//RETURN resultProduct
WITH COLLECT(resultProduct) as rPC,resultProduct.ET as eT,iN,iM,resultProduct.Divisor as rpD1,maxDivisor
UNWIND RANGE(0,SIZE(rPC)-1) as iI
WITH rPC[iI].DS as rPCDS,eT,iN,iM,rpD1,maxDivisor
UNWIND rPCDS as rPCDSU
WITH {RScalarList:COLLECT({RScalar:rPCDSU.ResultScalar}),RDegree:rPCDSU.ResultDegree,RDivisor:rPCDSU.ResultDivisor,ET:eT,Divisor:rpD1} as resultMap,iN,iM,maxDivisor
WITH COLLECT(resultMap) as resultMapC,resultMap.RDivisor as rDivisor,resultMap.ET as eTrm,resultMap.RDegree as rDRM,iN,iM,resultMap.Divisor as rpD2,maxDivisor
UNWIND RANGE(0,SIZE(resultMapC)-1) as iII
WITH resultMapC[iII].RScalarList as rSL,rDivisor,rDRM,iN,iM,rpD2,maxDivisor    //,eTrm
UNWIND RANGE(0,SIZE(rSL)-1) as iIII
UNWIND rSL[iIII] as rSLI
//RETURN rSLI.RScalar,rDivisor,rDRM,iN,iM,maxDivisor,eTrm
WITH COLLECT(apoc.number.exact.mul(rSLI.RScalar,apoc.number.exact.div(maxDivisor,rDivisor))) as cts,rDRM,iN,iM,rpD2,"0" as accumulator,maxDivisor //  rDivisor, 
CREATE (a:Accumulator { acc:"0"})
FOREACH (n IN cts| SET a.acc = apoc.number.exact.add(a.acc,n))  
WITH {DSList:COLLECT({Degree:rDRM,Scalar:a.acc}),DivideBy:maxDivisor} AS pTerms,iM,iN 

//  Below need a refactor - the degree should not be in the collected maps  -  the number.exact.mul should occure earlier in the script.
//WITH {DSList:COLLECT({Degree:rDRM,Scalar:apoc.number.exact.mul(a.acc,apoc.number.exact.div(maxDivisor,rDivisor))}),DivideBy:maxDivisor} AS pTerms,iM,iN

WITH COLLECT(pTerms) as pTermss,iM,iN
UNWIND RANGE(0,SIZE(pTermss)-1) as pT
WITH pTermss[pT].DSList as dSList,iN,iM,pTermss[pT].DivideBy AS pTD
UNWIND dSList as dSListU
//RETURN dSListU.Degree,dSListU.Scalar,pTD,iM,iN
WITH dSListU.Degree AS tDegree,dSListU.Scalar AS tScalar,iN,iM,pTD

MERGE (i:IndexedByArgument {N:iN,MaxN:iM,Dimension:"32"} )  
CREATE (v:VertexNode {Scalar:tScalar,Degree:toString(tDegree)} )
MERGE (e:Evaluate {Value:toString(toInteger(2^toInteger(iN)))}) //  Must be integer value.... Must compute evaluate   or just say it is computing 2^n  --- need some apoc,number.exact here.
MERGE (i) -[:IndexedByEvaluate]->(e)
MERGE  (i)-[eee:VertexIndexedBy {twoSeq:"99", divisor:pTD}]->(v)    //  D8 script is multiplying scalar by twoSeq.
RETURN COUNT(i) 
//WITH {MaxN:iM,N:iN,Ncount:count(iN),Degree:toString(tDegree),countDegree:count(tDegree)} as grTelem
//RETURN grTelem.MaxN,grTelem.N,grTelem.Ncount,grTelem.Degree,grTelem.countDegree
